---
title: "LCGA_Analyses_K01_final1123"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library("dplyr")
library("readr")
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(parameters)
library(tidyverse)
library(nnet)
library(broom)
library(MASS)
library(corrplot)
```

read in data, set class, and z-score
```{r}
lcgadir <- "/Users/shiyinliu/Desktop/CANDYLab/LCGA"
merged3 <- read_csv(file.path(lcgadir, "3cluster_merged.csv"))

merged3$cluster_rads <- as.factor(merged3$cluster_rads)
merged3$cluster_masc <- as.factor(merged3$cluster_masc)

merged3$RADS_baseline <- merged3$RADS_total.x
merged3$MASC_baseline <- merged3$MASC_total.x

merged3$left_CEN <- merged3$left_CEM
merged3$SN_insula_parietal <- merged3$salience_insula_parietal

merged3$SN_dACC_z <- scale(merged3$SN_dACC)
merged3$salience_insula_parietal_z <- scale(merged3$salience_insula_parietal)
merged3$sgACC_mPFC_z <- scale(merged3$sgACC_mPFC)
merged3$DMN_PCC_z <- scale(merged3$DMN_PCC)
merged3$DMN_mPFC_z <- scale(merged3$DMN_mPFC)
merged3$right_CEN_frontoparietal_z <- scale(merged3$right_CEN_frontoparietal)
merged3$left_CEN_z <- scale(merged3$left_CEN)
merged3$parietal_attention_z <- scale(merged3$parietal_attention)
merged3$limbic_cingulate_z <- scale(merged3$limbic_cingulate)

merged3$L.Uncinate.FA <- as.numeric(merged3$L.Uncinate.FA.T1.mean)
merged3$L.Cingulum_Cingulate.FA <- as.numeric(merged3$L.Cingulum_Cingulate.FA.T1.mean)
merged3$R.Cingulum_Cingulate.FA <- as.numeric(merged3$R.Cingulum_Cingulate.FA.T1.mean)
merged3$L.Uncinate.FA <- as.numeric(merged3$L.Uncinate.FA.T1.mean)
merged3$R.Uncinate.FA <- as.numeric(merged3$R.Uncinate.FA.T1.mean)
merged3$Callosum_Forceps_Minor.FA <- as.numeric(merged3$Callosum_Forceps_Minor.FA.T1.mean)

merged3$leftCC_z <- scale(merged3$L.Cingulum_Cingulate.FA.T1.mean)
merged3$rightCC_z <- scale(merged3$R.Cingulum_Cingulate.FA.T1.mean)
merged3$leftU_z <- scale(as.numeric(merged3$L.Uncinate.FA.T1.mean))
merged3$rightU_z <- scale(merged3$R.Uncinate.FA.T1.mean)
merged3$cfm_z <- scale(merged3$Callosum_Forceps_Minor.FA.T1.mean)

#for supplemental analyses
merged3$leftCC_ad_z <- scale(merged3$L.Cingulum_Cingulate.AD.T1.mean)
merged3$leftCC_rd_z <- scale(merged3$L.Cingulum_Cingulate.RD.T1.mean)
merged3$rightU_ad_z <- scale(merged3$R.Uncinate.AD.T1.mean)
merged3$rightU_rd_z <- scale(merged3$R.Uncinate.RD.T1.mean)

merged3$Current_Med_Psych <- as.factor(merged3$Current_Med_Psych)
merged3$COVID <- as.factor(merged3$COVID)
merged3$sex <- as.factor(merged3$Sex.x)
```

baseline zero-order correlations 
```{r}
vars<-c("RADS_baseline","MASC_baseline","SN_dACC","SN_insula_parietal","sgACC_mPFC","DMN_PCC","DMN_mPFC","right_CEN_frontoparietal","left_CEN","parietal_attention","limbic_cingulate","L.Cingulum_Cingulate.FA","R.Cingulum_Cingulate.FA","L.Uncinate.FA","R.Uncinate.FA","Callosum_Forceps_Minor.FA")
corrdata<-merged3[vars]

M<-cor(corrdata,method="pearson",use="pairwise.complete.obs") #missing observations dropped automatically per pairwise test

#matrix of the p-value of the correlation
cor.mtest <- function(mat, ...) {
  mat <- as.matrix(mat)
  n <- ncol(mat)
  p.mat <- matrix(NA, n, n)
  diag(p.mat) <- 0
  
  for (i in 1:(n - 1)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):n) {
      tmp <- cor.test(mat[, i], mat[, j], ...)
      p.mat[i, j] <- tmp$p.value
      p.mat[j, i] <- tmp$p.value
    }
  }
  
  colnames(p.mat) <- rownames(p.mat) <- colnames(mat)
  return(p.mat)
}

p.mat <-cor.mtest(corrdata)

png("corrplot_figure.png", width = 2500, height = 2000, res = 300)
corrplot(
  M,
  method = "number",
  type = "upper",
  order = "hclust",
  tl.col = "black",
  tl.cex = 0.8,
  tl.srt = 45,
  diag = FALSE,
  number.cex = 0.7,
  p.mat = p.mat,
  sig.level = 0.05,
  insig = "blank"           # hide non-sig
)
dev.off()
```

ordinal logistic regression
resting state and depression
```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
regions <- c(
  "SN_dACC_z",
  "salience_insula_parietal_z",
  "sgACC_mPFC_z",
  "DMN_PCC_z",
  "DMN_mPFC_z",
  "right_CEN_frontoparietal_z",
  "left_CEN_z",
  "parietal_attention_z",
  "limbic_cingulate_z"
)
# Initialize empty dataframe for results
summary_results <- data.frame()

for (region in regions) {
  message("Running model for ", region)
  dat <- na.omit(merged3[, c("Participant", "cluster_rads", region,
                             "meanFD", "Current_Med_Psych", 
                             "RADS_baseline", "COVID", "Age.at.V1", "sex")])
  # Null model
  m0 <- polr(cluster_rads ~ meanFD + Current_Med_Psych + RADS_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex, data = dat)
  # Full model
  formula_full <- as.formula(paste("cluster_rads ~", region, "+ meanFD + Current_Med_Psych + RADS_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex"))
  m1 <- polr(formula_full, data = dat)
  # Model comparison
  model_comp <- anova(m0, m1, test = "Chisq")
  p_diff <- model_comp$`Pr(Chi)`[2]
  # Extract coefficients
  ctable <- coef(summary(m1))
  p_vals <- pnorm(abs(ctable[, "t value"]), lower.tail = FALSE) * 2
  ctable <- cbind(ctable, "p value" = p_vals)
  # Focus on the region variable
  region_row <- ctable[grep(region, rownames(ctable)), , drop = FALSE]
  # Compute odds ratio and CI
  est <- region_row[1, "Value"]
  se <- region_row[1, "Std. Error"]
  OR <- exp(est)
  CI_lower <- exp(est - 1.96 * se)
  CI_upper <- exp(est + 1.96 * se)
  p_val <- region_row[1, "p value"]
  summary_results <- rbind(summary_results,
                           data.frame(
                             region = region,
                             OR = OR,
                             CI_lower = CI_lower,
                             CI_upper = CI_upper,
                             p = p_val,
                             anova_p = p_diff
                           ))
}

# Clean up
summary_results <- summary_results %>%
  mutate(sig = ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", ""),
         region = factor(region, levels = regions))

summary_results <- summary_results %>%
  mutate(
    p_fdr = p.adjust(anova_p, method = "BH"),
    sig_fdr = ifelse(p_fdr < 0.05, "*", "")
  )

print(summary_results)

# ---- Plot ----
# Figure 4A
figureRestingDep <- ggplot(summary_results, aes(x = region, y = OR, ymin = CI_lower, ymax = CI_upper)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(color = p < 0.05), size = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +  # Increase overall base font size
  labs(
    title = "Baseline Resting State Connectivity Predicting Depression Cluster Membership",
    x = "Network",
    y = "Odds Ratio (95% CI)",
    color = "Significant (p < .05)"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.56),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

ggsave("figureRestingDep.png", figureRestingDep, device = "png", width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

#extracting parameters for significant ICA components
m_dmn_mpfc_dep <- polr(cluster_rads ~ DMN_mPFC_z + meanFD + Current_Med_Psych + RADS_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex, data = merged3)
parameters(m_dmn_mpfc_dep, exponentiate = TRUE)
m_right_CEN_fp_dep <- polr(cluster_rads ~ right_CEN_frontoparietal_z + meanFD + Current_Med_Psych + RADS_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex, data = merged3)
parameters(m_right_CEN_fp_dep, exponentiate = TRUE)
```

DTI and depression
```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
tracts <- c(
  "leftCC_z",
  "rightCC_z",
  "leftU_z",
  "rightU_z",
  "cfm_z"
)
summary_results <- data.frame()
for (tract in tracts) {
  message("Running model for ", tract)
  dat <- na.omit(merged3[, c("Participant", "cluster_rads", tract,
                             "motav.T1", "Current_Med_Psych", 
                             "RADS_baseline", "COVID", "Age.at.V1", "sex")])
  # Null model
  m0 <- polr(cluster_rads ~ motav.T1 + Current_Med_Psych + RADS_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex, data = dat)
  # Full model
  formula_full <- as.formula(paste("cluster_rads ~", tract, "+ motav.T1 + Current_Med_Psych + RADS_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex"))
  m1 <- polr(formula_full, data = dat)
  # Model comparison
  model_comp <- anova(m0, m1, test = "Chisq")
  p_diff <- model_comp$`Pr(Chi)`[2]
  # Extract coefficients
  ctable <- coef(summary(m1))
  p_vals <- pnorm(abs(ctable[, "t value"]), lower.tail = FALSE) * 2
  ctable <- cbind(ctable, "p value" = p_vals)
  # Focus on the tract variable
  tract_row <- ctable[grep(tract, rownames(ctable)), , drop = FALSE]
  # Compute odds ratio and CI
  est <- tract_row[1, "Value"]
  se <- tract_row[1, "Std. Error"]
  OR <- exp(est)
  CI_lower <- exp(est - 1.96 * se)
  CI_upper <- exp(est + 1.96 * se)
  p_val <- tract_row[1, "p value"]
  summary_results <- rbind(summary_results,
                           data.frame(
                             tract = tract,
                             OR = OR,
                             CI_lower = CI_lower,
                             CI_upper = CI_upper,
                             p = p_val,
                             anova_p = p_diff
                           ))
}
# Clean up
summary_results <- summary_results %>%
  mutate(sig = ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", ""),
         tract = factor(tract, levels = tracts))

summary_results <- summary_results %>%
  mutate(
    p_fdr = p.adjust(anova_p, method = "BH"),
    sig_fdr = ifelse(p_fdr < 0.05, "*", "")
  )

print(summary_results)
# ---- Plot ----
figureDTIdep <- ggplot(summary_results, aes(x = tract, y = OR, ymin = CI_lower, ymax = CI_upper)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(color = p < 0.05)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Baseline White Matter Integrity Predicting Depression Cluster Membership",
    x = "Tract FA",
    y = "Odds Ratio (95% CI)",
    color = "Significant (p < .05)"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.3),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )

ggsave("figureDTIdep.png", figureDTIdep, device = "png", width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

m_leftCC_dep <- polr(cluster_rads ~ leftCC_z + motav.T1 + Current_Med_Psych + RADS_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex, data = merged3)
m_leftCC_dep_minusCovid <- polr(cluster_rads ~ leftCC_z + motav.T1 + Current_Med_Psych + RADS_baseline + Age.at.V1 + sex, data = merged3)
parameters(m_leftCC_dep, exponentiate = TRUE)
```

resting state and anxiety
```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
regions <- c(
  "SN_dACC_z",
  "salience_insula_parietal_z",
  "sgACC_mPFC_z",
  "DMN_PCC_z",
  "DMN_mPFC_z",
  "right_CEN_frontoparietal_z",
  "left_CEN_z",
  "parietal_attention_z",
  "limbic_cingulate_z"
)
# Initialize empty dataframe for results
summary_results <- data.frame()
for (region in regions) {
  message("Running model for ", region)
  dat <- na.omit(merged3[, c("Participant", "cluster_masc", region,
                             "meanFD", "Current_Med_Psych", 
                             "MASC_baseline", "COVID", "Age.at.V1", "sex")])
  # Null model
  m0 <- polr(cluster_masc ~ meanFD + Current_Med_Psych + MASC_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex, data = dat)
  # Full model
  formula_full <- as.formula(paste("cluster_masc ~", region, "+ meanFD + Current_Med_Psych + MASC_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex"))
  m1 <- polr(formula_full, data = dat)
  # Model comparison
  model_comp <- anova(m0, m1, test = "Chisq")
  p_diff <- model_comp$`Pr(Chi)`[2]
  # Extract coefficients
  ctable <- coef(summary(m1))
  p_vals <- pnorm(abs(ctable[, "t value"]), lower.tail = FALSE) * 2
  ctable <- cbind(ctable, "p value" = p_vals)
  # Focus on the region variable
  region_row <- ctable[grep(region, rownames(ctable)), , drop = FALSE]
  # Compute odds ratio and CI
  est <- region_row[1, "Value"]
  se <- region_row[1, "Std. Error"]
  OR <- exp(est)
  CI_lower <- exp(est - 1.96 * se)
  CI_upper <- exp(est + 1.96 * se)
  p_val <- region_row[1, "p value"]
  summary_results <- rbind(summary_results,
                           data.frame(
                             region = region,
                             OR = OR,
                             CI_lower = CI_lower,
                             CI_upper = CI_upper,
                             p = p_val,
                             anova_p = p_diff
                           ))
}
# Clean up
summary_results <- summary_results %>%
  mutate(sig = ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", ""),
         region = factor(region, levels = regions))

summary_results <- summary_results %>%
  mutate(
    p_fdr = p.adjust(anova_p, method = "BH"),
    sig_fdr = ifelse(p_fdr < 0.05, "*", "")
  )

print(summary_results)

# ---- Plot ----
figureRestingAnx <- ggplot(summary_results, aes(x = region, y = OR, ymin = CI_lower, ymax = CI_upper)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(color = p < 0.05), size = 1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +  # Increase overall base font size
  labs(
    title = "Baseline Resting State Connectivity Predicting Anxiety Cluster Membership",
    x = "Network",
    y = "Odds Ratio (95% CI)",
    color = "Significant (p < .05)"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.3),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )
ggsave("figureRestingAnx.png", figureRestingAnx, device = "png", width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
#extracting parameters for significant ICA components
m_par_att_anx <- polr(cluster_masc ~ parietal_attention_z + meanFD + Current_Med_Psych + MASC_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex, data = merged3)
parameters(m_par_att_anx, exponentiate = TRUE)
```

DTI and anxiety
```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
tracts <- c(
  "leftCC_z",
  "rightCC_z",
  "leftU_z",
  "rightU_z", 
  "cfm_z"
)
summary_results <- data.frame()
for (tract in tracts) {
  message("Running model for ", tract)
  dat <- na.omit(merged3[, c("Participant", "cluster_masc", tract,
                             "motav.T1", "Current_Med_Psych", 
                             "MASC_baseline", "COVID", "Age.at.V1", "sex")])
  # Null model
  m0 <- polr(cluster_masc ~ motav.T1 + Current_Med_Psych + MASC_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex, data = dat)
  # Full model
  formula_full <- as.formula(paste("cluster_masc ~", tract, "+ motav.T1 + Current_Med_Psych + MASC_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex"))
  m1 <- polr(formula_full, data = dat)
  # Model comparison
  model_comp <- anova(m0, m1, test = "Chisq")
  p_diff <- model_comp$`Pr(Chi)`[2]
  # Extract coefficients
  ctable <- coef(summary(m1))
  p_vals <- pnorm(abs(ctable[, "t value"]), lower.tail = FALSE) * 2
  ctable <- cbind(ctable, "p value" = p_vals)
  # Focus on the tract variable
  tract_row <- ctable[grep(tract, rownames(ctable)), , drop = FALSE]
  # Compute odds ratio and CI
  est <- tract_row[1, "Value"]
  se <- tract_row[1, "Std. Error"]
  OR <- exp(est)
  CI_lower <- exp(est - 1.96 * se)
  CI_upper <- exp(est + 1.96 * se)
  p_val <- tract_row[1, "p value"]
  
  summary_results <- rbind(summary_results,
                           data.frame(
                             tract = tract,
                             OR = OR,
                             CI_lower = CI_lower,
                             CI_upper = CI_upper,
                             p = p_val,
                             anova_p = p_diff
                           ))
}
# Clean up
summary_results <- summary_results %>%
  mutate(sig = ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", ""),
         tract = factor(tract, levels = tracts))

summary_results <- summary_results %>%
  mutate(
    p_fdr = p.adjust(anova_p, method = "BH"),
    sig_fdr = ifelse(p_fdr < 0.05, "*", "")
  )
print(summary_results)
# ---- Plot ----
figureDTIanx <- ggplot(summary_results, aes(x = tract, y = OR, ymin = CI_lower, ymax = CI_upper)) +
  geom_pointrange(aes(color = p < 0.05)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Baseline White Matter Integrity Predicting Anxiety Cluster Membership",
    x = "Tract FA",
    y = "Odds Ratio (95% CI)",
    color = "Significant (p < .05)"
  ) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12)
  )
ggsave("figureDTIanx.png", figureDTIanx, device = "png", width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)
#extracting parameters for significant ICA components
m_rightU_anx <- polr(cluster_masc ~ rightU_z + motav.T1 + Current_Med_Psych + MASC_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex, data = merged3)
parameters(m_rightU_anx, exponentiate = TRUE)
```

supplement
AD and RD analyses for significant FA values
```{r}
supp_tracts_dep <- c(
  "leftCC_ad_z",
  "leftCC_rd_z"
)
summary_results <- data.frame()
for (tract in supp_tracts_dep) {
  message("Running model for ", tract)
  dat <- na.omit(merged3[, c("Participant", "cluster_rads", tract,
                             "motav.T1", "Current_Med_Psych", 
                             "RADS_baseline", "COVID", "Age.at.V1", "sex")])
  # Null model
  m0 <- polr(cluster_rads ~ motav.T1 + Current_Med_Psych + RADS_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex, data = dat)
  # Full model
  formula_full <- as.formula(paste("cluster_rads ~", tract, "+ motav.T1 + Current_Med_Psych + RADS_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex"))
  m1 <- polr(formula_full, data = dat)
  # Model comparison
  model_comp <- anova(m0, m1, test = "Chisq")
  p_diff <- model_comp$`Pr(Chi)`[2]
  # Extract coefficients
  ctable <- coef(summary(m1))
  p_vals <- pnorm(abs(ctable[, "t value"]), lower.tail = FALSE) * 2
  ctable <- cbind(ctable, "p value" = p_vals)
  # Focus on the tract variable
  tract_row <- ctable[grep(tract, rownames(ctable)), , drop = FALSE]
  # Compute odds ratio and CI
  est <- tract_row[1, "Value"]
  se <- tract_row[1, "Std. Error"]
  OR <- exp(est)
  CI_lower <- exp(est - 1.96 * se)
  CI_upper <- exp(est + 1.96 * se)
  p_val <- tract_row[1, "p value"]
  summary_results <- rbind(summary_results,
                           data.frame(
                             tract = tract,
                             OR = OR,
                             CI_lower = CI_lower,
                             CI_upper = CI_upper,
                             p = p_val,
                             anova_p = p_diff
                           ))
}
# Clean up
summary_results <- summary_results %>%
  mutate(sig = ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", ""),
         tract = factor(tract, levels = supp_tracts_dep))
print(summary_results)

supp_tracts_anx <- c(
  "rightU_ad_z",
  "rightU_rd_z"
)
summary_results <- data.frame()
for (tract in supp_tracts_anx) {
  message("Running model for ", tract)
  dat <- na.omit(merged3[, c("Participant", "cluster_masc", tract,
                             "motav.T1", "Current_Med_Psych", 
                             "MASC_baseline", "COVID", "Age.at.V1", "sex")])
  # Null model
  m0 <- polr(cluster_masc ~ motav.T1 + Current_Med_Psych + MASC_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex, data = dat)
  # Full model
  formula_full <- as.formula(paste("cluster_masc ~", tract, "+ motav.T1 + Current_Med_Psych + MASC_baseline + COVID + Age.at.V1 + sex"))
  m1 <- polr(formula_full, data = dat)
  # Model comparison
  model_comp <- anova(m0, m1, test = "Chisq")
  p_diff <- model_comp$`Pr(Chi)`[2]
  # Extract coefficients
  ctable <- coef(summary(m1))
  p_vals <- pnorm(abs(ctable[, "t value"]), lower.tail = FALSE) * 2
  ctable <- cbind(ctable, "p value" = p_vals)
  # Focus on the tract variable
  tract_row <- ctable[grep(tract, rownames(ctable)), , drop = FALSE]
  # Compute odds ratio and CI
  est <- tract_row[1, "Value"]
  se <- tract_row[1, "Std. Error"]
  OR <- exp(est)
  CI_lower <- exp(est - 1.96 * se)
  CI_upper <- exp(est + 1.96 * se)
  p_val <- tract_row[1, "p value"]
  summary_results <- rbind(summary_results,
                           data.frame(
                             tract = tract,
                             OR = OR,
                             CI_lower = CI_lower,
                             CI_upper = CI_upper,
                             p = p_val,
                             anova_p = p_diff
                           ))
}
# Clean up
summary_results <- summary_results %>%
  mutate(sig = ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", ""),
         tract = factor(tract, levels = supp_tracts_anx))
print(summary_results)

```
